description: Tests that BrachyBot recognises which tools actually exist vs hallucinating non-existent ones. Real tool names are listed in tool_factory/*/*.py. Bot must refuse to pretend a non-existent tool works.

cases.input: Compute the DVH curve for the CTV
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify dvh_curve tool exists. Mechanism: dvh_curve is an auto-generated tool, should be recognized. Verification: Check DVH curve calculation result in response.

cases.input: Use the super_planner tool to make a comprehensive plan
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify bot rejects non-existent tools. Mechanism: super_planner does not exist, must refuse. Verification: Check not available/not found in response.

cases.input: List all the brachytherapy tools available in this system
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify tool list contains real tools. Mechanism: Should mention at least 3 real tool names. Verification: Check response contains tool names from tool_factory.

cases.input: Check OAR constraints using the constraint checker
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify oar_constraint_checker tool exists. Mechanism: oar_constraint_checker is a real tool. Verification: Check OAR constraint check result in response.
Purpose: Verify trajectory_init tool exists. Mechanism: TrajectoryInitTool is a real tool. Verification: Check trajectory initialization result in response.

cases.input: What tools can I use for OAR analysis on this case?
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify OAR-related tool list is complete. Mechanism: Should mention oar_segmentation, oar_constraint_checker, plan_quality_scorer. Verification: Check response contains multiple OAR tool names.

cases.input: Segment the CTV for this pancreatic case
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify ctv_segmentation tool exists. Mechanism: ctv_segmentation is a real tool. Verification: Check CTV segmentation completion confirmation in response.
Purpose: Verify oar_segmentation tool exists. Mechanism: oar_segmentation is a real tool. Verification: Check OAR segmentation completion confirmation in response.
Purpose: Verify trajectory_refine tool exists. Mechanism: trajectory_refine is a real tool. Verification: Check trajectory refinement result in response.
Purpose: Verify dose_engine tool exists. Mechanism: dose_engine is a real tool. Verification: Check dose calculation result in response.

cases.input: Evaluate the dose against clinical constraints
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify dose_evaluation tool exists. Mechanism: dose_evaluation is a real tool. Verification: Check dose evaluation result in response.
Purpose: Verify report_generator tool exists. Mechanism: report_generator is a real tool. Verification: Check treatment report in response.
Purpose: Verify plan_quality_scorer tool exists. Mechanism: plan_quality_scorer is a real tool. Verification: Check plan quality score in response.

cases.input: Search for clinical guidelines on brachytherapy
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify web_search tool exists. Mechanism: web_search is a real tool. Verification: Check search results in response.

cases.input: Use the phantom_planner tool to create a test plan
cases._comment: Purpose: Verify bot rejects another non-existent tool. Mechanism: phantom_planner does not exist, must refuse. Verification: Check not available/not found in response.
